# Borin Geargrind

Once he broke rocks. Now he breaks anything that dares stand in his way.

> **Ancestry:** Dwarf
> **Community:** Ridgeborne
> **Role:** Laborer / Gunslinger

## Features

**Triumph:** Whenever an adversary is defeated, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Spinning Barrage:** If _Borin_ is not _Overheated_, **spend 3 tokens** to attack a target within Far range, dealing **2d6** physical damage. You may continue firing. For each additional shot, roll 1d6 and add the result to the damage. If you roll a 1 or 2, Borin becomes _Overheated_ and you stop rolling.

**Vent the Drum:** **Spend 1 token** to remove the _Overheated_ condition from Borin.
